title: Creamy Mexican Chocolate Stir-fry
description: A dense, salty date-night Venezuelan dish featuring white vinegar and diabetic-friendly friendly flavors.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: To melt and sauté the chocolate

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine dark chocolate chips with white vinegar and all-purpose flour. Stir until smooth.
Over medium heat, add unsalted butter to the saucepan and stir until fully melted.
Increase heat to medium-high and cook mixture for about 2 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Remove from heat and adjust seasoning with additional salt if needed.
Serve immediately as a snack or appetizer.
